testcase.name: testTextBoxForm
testcase.system-out: 19:15:49 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.TextBoxTest - === Starting TextBoxTest suite === 19:15:51 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.TextBoxTest - Browser launched successfully 19:15:51 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.TextBoxTest - Creating new page and navigating to TextBox 19:15:51 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.TextBoxPage - Initializing TextBoxPage locators 19:15:51 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.TextBoxPage - Navigating to Text Box page 19:15:54 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.TextBoxTest - Running test: testTextBoxForm 19:15:54 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.TextBoxPage - Filling form with name: Susan Barrows and email: susan@test.com 19:15:54 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.TextBoxPage - Clicking submit button 19:15:54 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.TextBoxTest - Asserting output name is correct 19:15:54 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.TextBoxTest - Asserting output email is correct 19:15:54 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.TextBoxPage - Output name displayed: Name:Susan Barrows 19:15:54 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.TextBoxTest - ✅ Test passed: Name:Susan Barrows 19:15:54 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.TextBoxTest - Closing page after test
